Name: Jasper MCH Events
Description: General-purpose Machinist event profile for PvE. Keeps Tactician/Dismantle support, earlier self-heal recovery, normal 2+ target AoE/tool and burst release, damage-toggle safety, Head Graze interrupts, Arm's Length self-defense, wipe/zone reset scaffolding, compact manual controls, and optional out-of-combat Sprint for roulette-safe play. ForceAOE is manual-only and is never reset by this profile. Based on Arche's general reaction profile foundation, with Jasper modifications for public-duty safety and xSalice compatibility.

Events.Name: Second Wind
Events.Description: Uses Second Wind at 60 percent HP for earlier self-recovery.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Machinist ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores default Machinist toggles after zone changes.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Wipe
Events.Description: Restores default Machinist toggles after wipes.

Events.Name: Head Graze Interrupt
Events.Description: Uses Head Graze on casting enemies in range.

Events.Name: Arm's Length Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Arm's Length when you are stationary, low on HP, and holding multiple mobs.

Events.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Events.Description: Keeps Machinist burst, AoE, tool, Queen, Checkmate, and utility toggles healthy in combat so imported or held states do not leave the job passive.

Events.Name: Multi-Target AoE Release
Events.Description: Keeps normal Machinist AoE, tool, Queen, and burst toggles enabled on 2+ enemy pulls without touching ForceAOE.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 65%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for earlier Second Wind recovery.

Conditions.Name: Second Wind <= 65%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for earlier Second Wind recovery.

Logics.Name: Second Wind
Logics.Description: Uses Second Wind at 60 percent HP for earlier self-recovery.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Machinist ACR defaults out of combat, including AoE, tool, queen, and support toggles. ForceAOE is untouched.

Logics.Name: Head Graze Interrupt
Logics.Description: Uses Head Graze on casting enemies in range.

Logics.Name: Arm's Length Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Arm's Length as self-defense when stationary below 70 percent HP with two or more mobs on you.

Logics.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Logics.Description: Keeps Machinist burst, AoE, tool, Queen, Checkmate, and utility toggles healthy in combat so imported or held states do not leave the job passive.

Logics.Name: Multi-Target AoE Release
Logics.Description: Keeps normal Machinist AoE, tool, Queen, and burst toggles enabled on 2+ enemy pulls without touching ForceAOE.

Items.Name: Boss Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Machinist burst near the end of a boss. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Pack Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Machinist burst near the end of a trash pack. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Raid Mit
Items.Description: Uses Tactician and Dismantle for raidwide damage support.

Items.Name: Self Guard
Items.Description: Uses Second Wind and Arm's Length for personal emergency recovery.

Items.Name: Interrupt
Items.Description: Uses Head Graze on interruptible casts in range.
